description: From the Publisher A Year of Word Search Puzzles for 2026 This handily-sized book contains 217 pages of word search puzzles to solve. That's an impressive 366 puzzles in total. The rules of wordsearch are simple: A list of words is hidden in each grid. These may appear horizontally, vertically or diagonally in the grid: and all you need to do is find them. Every puzzle in this book is THEMED around a diverse and interesting range of topics such as New Year, Hairstyles, Yellow Things, Spanish Loanwords, Jazz Genres and many, many more. Puzzle Page From 2026 Wordsearch a Day The image to the right shows an internal spread from the book. Each page contains two dated wordsearch puzzles, corresponding to each day of the year in 2026 in order. You may wish to solve them one-a-day, or do several at a time: it's your book so it's entirely up to you how you solve the puzzles! Printed on quality white paper in clear black ink, this book is perfect for wordsearch aficionados and new wordsearch solvers alike. Full solutions are included at the back of the book so you can easily check your answers are correct.
